headlines.title: Fake Trump and Oprah ads fuel a wave of Medicare scams on Facebook, report says
headlines.description: Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, is failing to stop scammers who repeatedly buy ads on the platforms to target seniors with scams, a new report says.

headlines.title: Prediction market ‘watchdog’ launches six-figure ad campaign ahead of Senate hearing
headlines.description: A group that says its mission is to serve as a prediction market “watchdog” is launching a six-figure ad buy this week in the Washington, D.C., media market.

headlines.title: Eric Schmidt booed during graduation speech about AI
headlines.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was booed multiple times while discussing artificial intelligence during a commencement speech at the University of Arizona.

headlines.title: Six tech billionaires walked into a federal courthouse. Here’s what happened next.
headlines.description: The three-week OpenAI trial had numerous markings of its subjects’ wealth, from an inflatable Elon Musk doll to fancy butt cushions.

headlines.title: Inside China’s race to dominate humanoid robotics industry
headlines.description: Beijing has put the robotics industry front and center of its national agenda as the tech race with Washington heats up in several key areas, including AI.

headlines.title: AI-generated pro-Spencer Pratt mayoral campaign videos point to a new political reality
headlines.description: Spencer Pratt’s bid for Los Angeles mayor gained viral traction after AI videos, which Pratt said were “fan-made,” circulated across social media.

headlines.title: Musk’s attorney apologizes for his absence at trial during closing arguments
headlines.description: Elon Musk had traveled to China with President Donald Trump even though the judge said he wasn’t excused.

headlines.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras soars 90% in year’s biggest IPO so far
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Cerebras surged 90% in its trading debut, setting the bar for the biggest initial public stock offering of the year so far.

headlines.title: Trump drops ‘unprecedented’ $10 billion lawsuit against IRS over leaked tax records
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is moving to voluntarily dismiss a $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS that legal experts had called “unprecedented,” according to a Monday court filing.

headlines.title: Judge rules some key evidence in Luigi Mangione state trial must be suppressed
headlines.description: A judge ruled that state prosecutors will be allowed to use some key evidence recovered during Luigi Mangione's arrest in his state criminal case, but that other key pieces of evidence will be suppressed. NBC News’ Danny Cevallos breaks down the ruling that is a partial win for the defense and how it affects the federal case.

headlines.title: Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda Declared Global Emergency
headlines.description: The World Health Organization declared the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda as a “public health emergency of international concern.” There are more than 300 suspected cases and 88 deaths.

headlines.title: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Arrives in Netherlands to Be Disinfected
headlines.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship at the center of the deadly hantavirus outbreak arrived in the Netherlands Monday where it will be disinfected. Meanwhile, a Canadian passenger has now tested positive as the 18 Americans from that ship remain in quarantine. NBC’s Maggie Vespa reports for TODAY.
